# Cyber Hat

> Cyber Hat is a privately held group supporting a portfolio of specialised
> security teams. We provide long-term capital, operational support, and a
> trusted network to founders working on hard problems in security.

## Pages
- [Home](https://cyberh.at/): Overview of Cyber Hat's approach, focus areas, and contact details.

## Contact
- General: hello@cyberh.at
- Security disclosures: security@cyberh.at
